title: Fourier Transform Reference Pack
summary: Reference material explaining frequency-domain decomposition through sound.

blocks.title: Frequency domain
blocks.text: The frequency domain describes which frequency components make up a signal.
A musical chord can be modeled as several pure tones added together.
If a spectrum has peaks at 440 Hz and 880 Hz, identify the fundamental and first overtone.

concepts.name: Frequency decomposition
concepts.summary: Breaking a complex signal into frequency components.
